# Ssh Command Preset

## Overview

gSage AI ‚Äî SSH Preset Command tool (no approval required).

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `ssh_command_preset` | Execute a pre-configured SSH command preset on a remote host (no approval required) | `ssh:execute` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Multiple profiles supported** ‚Äî you may create more than one config row per organisation, each with a distinct `profile_id`. The agent picks one via the `config_profile` parameter at call time. State, rate limits and circuit-breaker counters are isolated per profile.

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below ‚Äî set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "allowed_cidrs": [],
  "allowed_command_patterns": [],
  "allowed_host_patterns": [],
  "command_timeout_seconds": 30,
  "connection_timeout_seconds": 10,
  "credential_profiles": [],
  "denied_command_patterns": [],
  "hosts": [],
  "max_output_bytes": 65536,
  "preset_commands": []
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `allowed_cidrs` | `array` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `[]` | IPv4/IPv6 CIDR blocks that a dynamic hostname must resolve into. When the hostname does not match any allowed_host_patterns, it is resolved via DNS and the resulting IP is checked against these CIDRs. The resolved IP is used for the SSH connection to prevent DNS rebinding. Example: ['192.168.10.0/24', '10.0.0.0/8'] |
| `allowed_command_patterns` | `array` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `[]` | Regex allow list for arbitrary commands (used by ssh_command tool only). At least one pattern must match the command for it to be executed. When empty, all commands are allowed (subject to the deny list). Example: ['^ps\\b', '^tail\\b', '^cat\\s+/var/log/'] |
| `allowed_host_patterns` | `array` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `[]` | Regex patterns tested with re.fullmatch (case-insensitive) against the hostname supplied by the LLM for dynamic host access. When a pattern matches, the hostname is allowed without DNS resolution. Use anchored patterns to prevent substring bypass. Example: ['^192\\.168\\.10\\.\\d+$', '^[a-z0-9-]+\\.internal\\.example\\.com$'] |
| `command_timeout_seconds` | `integer` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `30` | Seconds to wait for the remote command to complete. Default: 30. |
| `connection_timeout_seconds` | `integer` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `10` | Seconds to wait for SSH TCP connection. Default: 10. |
| `credential_profiles` | `array` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `[]` | Named credential profiles for dynamic host access. The LLM selects a profile by key when using the 'hostname' parameter. |
| `denied_command_patterns` | `array` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `[]` | Regex deny list applied to ALL commands on both tools. Commands matching any pattern are blocked. Example: ['^sudo\\b', 'wget\\s+.*\\\|\\s*(ba)?sh'] |
| `hosts` | `array` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `[]` | List of SSH hosts available for this tool. |
| `max_output_bytes` | `integer` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `65536` | Maximum bytes to capture from stdout + stderr combined. Default: 65536. |
| `preset_commands` | `array` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `[]` | Pre-defined commands that can be run without approval. |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_SSH_COMMAND_PRESET__ALLOWED_CIDRS` | `allowed_cidrs` | `array` | `[]` | ‚Äî | IPv4/IPv6 CIDR blocks that a dynamic hostname must resolve into. When the hostname does not match any allowed_host_patterns, it is resolved via DNS and the resulting IP is checked against these CIDRs. The resolved IP is used for the SSH connection to prevent DNS rebinding. Example: ['192.168.10.0/24', '10.0.0.0/8'] |
| `TOOL_SSH_COMMAND_PRESET__ALLOWED_COMMAND_PATTERNS` | `allowed_command_patterns` | `array` | `[]` | ‚Äî | Regex allow list for arbitrary commands (used by ssh_command tool only). At least one pattern must match the command for it to be executed. When empty, all commands are allowed (subject to the deny list). Example: ['^ps\\b', '^tail\\b', '^cat\\s+/var/log/'] |
| `TOOL_SSH_COMMAND_PRESET__ALLOWED_HOST_PATTERNS` | `allowed_host_patterns` | `array` | `[]` | ‚Äî | Regex patterns tested with re.fullmatch (case-insensitive) against the hostname supplied by the LLM for dynamic host access. When a pattern matches, the hostname is allowed without DNS resolution. Use anchored patterns to prevent substring bypass. Example: ['^192\\.168\\.10\\.\\d+$', '^[a-z0-9-]+\\.internal\\.example\\.com$'] |
| `TOOL_SSH_COMMAND_PRESET__COMMAND_TIMEOUT_SECONDS` | `command_timeout_seconds` | `integer` | `30` | ‚Äî | Seconds to wait for the remote command to complete. Default: 30. |
| `TOOL_SSH_COMMAND_PRESET__CONNECTION_TIMEOUT_SECONDS` | `connection_timeout_seconds` | `integer` | `10` | ‚Äî | Seconds to wait for SSH TCP connection. Default: 10. |
| `TOOL_SSH_COMMAND_PRESET__CREDENTIAL_PROFILES` | `credential_profiles` | `array` | `[]` | ‚Äî | Named credential profiles for dynamic host access. The LLM selects a profile by key when using the 'hostname' parameter. |
| `TOOL_SSH_COMMAND_PRESET__DENIED_COMMAND_PATTERNS` | `denied_command_patterns` | `array` | `[]` | ‚Äî | Regex deny list applied to ALL commands on both tools. Commands matching any pattern are blocked. Example: ['^sudo\\b', 'wget\\s+.*\\\|\\s*(ba)?sh'] |
| `TOOL_SSH_COMMAND_PRESET__HOSTS` | `hosts` | `array` | `[]` | ‚Äî | List of SSH hosts available for this tool. |
| `TOOL_SSH_COMMAND_PRESET__MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES` | `max_output_bytes` | `integer` | `65536` | ‚Äî | Maximum bytes to capture from stdout + stderr combined. Default: 65536. |
| `TOOL_SSH_COMMAND_PRESET__PRESET_COMMANDS` | `preset_commands` | `array` | `[]` | ‚Äî | Pre-defined commands that can be run without approval. |
